feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,702Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 100

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Between Static and Silence
entry.summary:
Author: DileepKousik

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,318Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 3

Summary: A well-known voice actor—famous for bringing emotion to characters no one ever sees—starts receiving anonymous late-night calls from someone who refuses to reveal anything about himself. No name.No face.No location. Only a voice. At first, it feels like coincidence. Then routine. Then necessity.

entry.title: Parallels
entry.summary:
Author: TheReadingGhost

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 752Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: Is love a feeling or is love trust? Parallel lines of thought between Derek and Stiles. Kinda.OrA short commentary on love I guess.OrI’m hoping this will get me back in the mood to write so enjoy this short and semi sweet ficlet.

entry.summary:

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,879Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

entry.title: Of A Butterfly's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: Mikaelsonbich25

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 140,575Chapters: 90/?Kudos: 296

Summary: Klaus had expected to be done with life after sacrificing himself. He was sure that he could finally rest and be done with it. But, much to his dismay, an otherworldly being had other plans, due to finding Klaus as a source of entertainment.In snatching away his desired death, Klaus Mikaelson was reincarnated into another world as a young magic caster named Stiles Stilinski. With no choice but to live, Klaus decides to use this opportunity to take over Beacon Hills and make it his kingdom.And maybe one day, he'll be strong enough to find a way back home to his world.

entry.title: Daddy’s Little Monster
entry.summary:
Author: EverythingRara

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,502Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: It was no surprise what exactly Stiles had in mind for a little extra compensation after they both clocked out from the bite. "You haven't even seen it yet," Derek said, not protesting exactly... just clearly having underestimated Stiles' eagerness to jump straight in. "That makes it all the more exciting, don't you think?" Stiles shot back, taking his plush bottom lip between his teeth. They'd fucked only hours ago—Derek's knot tying them together in his office, but that didn't stop his dick from giving an interested jump at the prospect of more. It was all to easy to imagine Stiles' pretty pussy red and gushing with his come once more. "What am I going to do with you?" Derek asked, anticipation settling thickly in his gut as he stared at his boy. Stiles smiled, wide and eager, offering a coy: "Hopefully a lot of things," Inspired by/sequel to the story it’s just a curve upon the lips, the hips by scribespirare

entry.title: Forever
entry.summary:
Author: ditheringmind

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,672Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 194

Summary: “Hey,” the message says. Just that nothing more. Easily ignored. If it were important, there would be more detail or Derek’s phone would ring. He shoves the anxiety-inducing technology back under his belly. He is exhausted once again, just the possibility of being needed to have to pull himself together, to appear normal. It makes his bones ache

entry.title: Threshold of the Void
entry.summary:
Author: Infernos

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,846Chapters: 7/18Kudos: 8

Summary: The Druid Council needs Stiles's help. Eight hundred years ago, druids made a catastrophic mistake, creating Tairseach Folús, a dimensional entity that feeds on supernatural life force. After devastating losses, seventeen druids sacrificed themselves to create a prison outside of our reality where the entity would be contained forever. Seventy-five years ago, a rogue druid discovered records of the prison and relocated it, anchoring it to the ley lines beneath San Francisco, where it began to degrade. The Councils formed a coalition with other supernaturals to reinforce the seals, but in this reality, those seals won't last. Now, a vengeful hunter family has allied with the druid and his followers. They intend to shatter the prison during the autumn equinox, bind the monster to their will, and use it to systematically wipe out the supernaturals. Stiles has eighteen days to stop them and find a way to send Tairseach back where it came from, before it consumes every supernatural being on the West Coast...and beyond

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,616Chapters: 10/15Kudos: 19

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Five Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 977Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: kintsugi
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,623Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: They can’t do anything else but kiss passionately for the time being, but it’s enough, and the way Stiles holds Derek’s face is healing in itself. Someone cares about him, someone loves him unconditionally, even through all this shit, day after day, everything Derek has to live through and cannot control. Stiles is here, and staying, and never letting him go.Derek’s reached his breaking point too many times to count, now, and today is one of those points, again. But Stiles knows how to glue him back together, fill his jagged cracks with gold, soothe all he can and kiss away what hurts.

entry.title: Of Silver & Amber
entry.summary:
Author: DarkInsanity (Stereklenidus)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,867Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: When the mayor of Beacon's Hollow hires Derek Hale—a Witcher of the School of the Wolf—to clear a rotfiend den beneath a reclusive warlock's tower, Derek expects the usual: a contract, a monster, and solitude. What he gets is three mercenaries who refuse to stop following him, a bard on a donkey with strong opinions about hills, a warlock who won't answer his door, and a goblin with very specific grievances. Also a unicorn. The unicorn is not helping. Derek Hale does not fail. He does not need backup. He does not—under any circumstances—feel things about the people who keep showing up anyway. (He is, it turns out, wrong about at least three of these things.)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,840Chapters: 4/11Kudos: 52

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: Not just a useless human (English version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,755Chapters: 17/17Kudos: 39

Summary: Stiles Stilinski is alone. Scott abandoned him to join Derek's pack, and he's not welcome. He tries to build a new life, but trouble seems to be targeting him even though he's cut ties with the supernatural. Alpha packs, serial killers, and now a disease he hoped he wouldn't have. Stiles will soon discover that everything he knew about himself was a lie.
